title: 8 Pcs Baby Bath Toys For 1 2 3 4 Year Olds, Floating Bath Squirter Toys No Mould Sea Animals Bathtub Toy For Newborn Toddler Playing
features: Set: Contains 6 different styles of rubber bath toys, enough to meet the needs of children's play. (TIPS:There are holes in the bottom of the duck, it cannot make a sound, but at the same time it can float on the water.）
Material: These bath toys is made of rubber, which is flexible, soft, friendly to children's skin, and not easy to fade.

Design: The design has interesting patterns, including great white sharks, green turtles, blue whales, farm cows, pink pigs, yellow spot fish, hairy crabs, and small flying ducks, which are fun and vivid and can easily attract children's attention.
Happy bathing: Bath toys are very light and can float on the water well. No matter how you fiddle with it, it always floats on the water in the end, which can make children's bathing more happy.
Gift: Bath toys are very suitable as gifts for relatives and friends with children at home, bringing them different bathing fun.
